title: AllocationRequest
description: AllocationRequest schema from Palo Alto Networks SASE Subscription Service API

allocations.description: Array of TSG allocations to set. Each entry specifies a child TSG and the quantity to allocate to it. Existing allocations for TSGs not included in the array are unchanged.

tsg_id.description: Child TSG ID to allocate licenses to.

quantity.description: Number of licenses to allocate to this TSG.
